retrieved_result: On Broadway On Broadway The interactive installation On Broadway represents life in the 21st century city through a compilation of images and data collected along the 13 miles of Broadway that span Manhattan. The result is a new type of city view, created from the activities of hundreds of thousands of people.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result describes an interactive installation about Broadway and city life, not about TikTok trends or 2024 trends.
